Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && python -c "
import json
papers = json.load\(open\('test_papers.json'\)\)
print\(f'Total papers: {len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(\)
for p in papers[:3]:
    print\(f'  ID:      {p[\\"arxiv_id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Title:   {p[\\"title\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Authors: {p[\\"authors\\"][:3]}'\)
    print\(f'  Cats:    {p[\\"subcategories\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Abstr:   {p[\\"abstract\\"][:120]}...'\)
    print\(\)
")
Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && conda env create -f environment.yml 2>&1)
Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && conda run -n arxiv-grader pip install python-dotenv -q && python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('create_profile.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")

Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && conda run -n arxiv-grader python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
from anthropic import Anthropic
client = Anthropic\(\)
r = client.messages.create\(
    model='claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
    max_tokens=32,
    messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': 'say hi'}]
\)
print\('OK:', r.content[0].text\)
")

Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && python -c "import json; papers=json.load\(open\('data/2026-03-19/scored_papers_v2.json'\)\); [print\(f\\"{p['score']:2d}/10  {p['triage']:6s}  {p['tags']}  {p['title'][:55]}\\"\) for p in papers]")

Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && python -c "
import json
papers = json.load\(open\('data/2026-03-18/scored_test.json'\)\)
for p in papers:
    print\(f\\"{p['score']:2d}/10  {p['triage']:6s}  {p['tags']}\\"  \)
    print\(f\\"        {p['title'][:75]}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"        {p['justification']}\\"\)
    print\(\)
")
